title: Corona Coffee Table (Square)
summary: A square coffee table on four turned legs, with a plywood bottom shelf and a 2x6 breadboard-ended plank top — different from this catalog's box-frame and Parsons-style square coffee tables.
description:
Four purchased turned legs carry this table, so source them before cutting anything else — the apron height and shelf position both depend on the leg length you land on. The 1x3 apron frames the top of the legs on all four sides, with the plywood bottom shelf set low between them for a genuine two-tier look, unlike this catalog's single-slab box-frame square table.

The top is built from seven 2x6 boards run edge to edge, capped on both ends with breadboard pieces **cut to fit your own assembled top** rather than a fixed length — measure before cutting these, since board width variance changes the fit. This plank-and-breadboard top is a different construction from the Parsons-style table's framed 1x12 inset top.

Assemble with pocket holes throughout for clean, hidden joinery on a piece with turned legs meant to be the visual focus.

materials.name: Turned legs, 4 in x 4 in x 18 in
Primer and paint, or stain and poly

cutList.material: Turned legs, 4 in x 4 in x 18 in

cutList.note: Cut to fit your assembled top.

steps.title: Attach the aprons to the legs
steps.body: Attach the aprons to all four sides of the four turned legs to form the base.
materials: Turned legs, 4 in x 4 in x 18 in

steps.title: Attach the bottom shelf
steps.body: Set the plywood bottom shelf between the legs, low in the base.

steps.title: Build and attach the top
steps.body: Join the seven 2x6 center boards edge to edge, measure the assembly, and cut the breadboard ends to fit before attaching.

steps.title: Attach the top to the base
steps.body: Attach the finished top to the leg-and-apron base.

steps.title: Finish
steps.body: Sand all surfaces and apply primer and paint, or stain and poly.
materials: Primer and paint, or stain and poly

unresolvedImages.alt: Square Corona coffee table with turned legs
